name: Daniel Schnyder
abstract: Daniel Schnyder (born March 12, 1961) is a Swiss jazz reedist and composer of both jazz and classical music. Schnyder learned to play cello before saxophone.

works_created.t: Trio for Violin, Horn, and Piano, "Walden"

about_quotes.speaker: Konitz Lee
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee only responds to the interviewer's mention of Daniel Schnyder with a factual correction ('String sextet actually...'), showing no personal interaction or relationship.
about_quotes.doc_title: Konitz Lee — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
